category_sources: Official PyPI/project README describes streamrip installation, usage, and supported music services.
source_facts.description says streamrip is a scriptable music downloader for Qobuz, Tidal, SoundCloud, and Deezer.
display_name_sources: Official repository and PyPI project use the name streamrip.
docs_sources: Official README points users to detailed installation instructions and the project wiki for more in-depth information.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository.
repo_sources: Official PyPI project links installation from the nathom/streamrip GitHub repository.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository https://github.com/nathom/streamrip.
tags_sources: Official README/PyPI content describes scriptable downloads and the rip CLI.
source_facts.description lists Qobuz, Tidal, SoundCloud, and Deezer support.
